facts.claim: Meet Brilliant Lady—the most anticipated new adults-only cruise ship. Dive into the smart cabins, restaurants, and exclusive new vibrant shows.
Our brand new ship will be making her inaugural voyage across North America starting Fall 2025.
Explore North America’s four corners from the charming Northeast, wild West Coast, Panama, and Alaska on our newest lady ship. Enjoy new eateries, new ship spaces, and new iconic itineraries.
Briiliant Lady is a cruise ship operated by Virgin Voyages.
